q1.question: What is an AI implementation partner?
q1.answer: An AI implementation partner is a specialized agency that designs, builds, and deploys custom AI systems for your business — including chatbots, workflow automations, and voice agents — so you get production-ready solutions without hiring an in-house AI team.

q2.question: How long does it take to implement AI?
q2.answer: Most single-service implementations (chatbot, automation workflow, or voice agent) go live within 1-3 weeks. A full Marketing Machine engagement typically takes 3-4 weeks for initial setup, with continuous optimization from day one.

q3.question: Do you work with SaaS and e-commerce companies?
q3.answer: Yes — SaaS and e-commerce are our core verticals. We build AI automations that integrate with platforms like HubSpot, Salesforce, Shopify, and WooCommerce, tailored to the specific workflows of subscription and retail businesses.

q4.question: What makes FMai different from other AI agencies?
q4.answer: We are not a consultancy that hands you a slide deck. We build, deploy, and manage your AI systems end-to-end. You get direct founder access, a success guarantee, and month-to-month contracts with no lock-in.

q5.question: How much does AI automation cost?
q5.answer: Our managed plans start at EUR 1,497/month for a single AI service and scale to EUR 3,997/month for the full suite. Every plan includes hosting, maintenance, and ongoing support — no hidden fees.

sections.challenges_heading: Why Does Your Marketing Team Need AI Automation?
sections.automations_heading: What Does Our Automation Service Include?
sections.process_heading: How Does an Automation Workflow Get Built?

q1.question: What is AI marketing automation?
q1.answer: AI marketing automation uses machine learning to execute repetitive marketing tasks — lead qualification, email sequences, CRM sync — without human intervention, running 24/7 with consistent quality.

q2.question: How long does it take to deploy an automation workflow?
q2.answer: Most workflow automations go live within 2-3 weeks: one week for audit and design, one week for build and testing, and a final integration sprint.

q3.question: Which tools do you integrate with?
q3.answer: We integrate with HubSpot, Salesforce, ActiveCampaign, Zapier, Make (Integromat), Airtable, Slack, Google Workspace, and most REST API-based platforms.

q4.question: Is AI automation suitable for small marketing teams?
q4.answer: Yes — AI automation scales down as well as up. Small teams (2-5 people) often see the biggest productivity gains because automation eliminates tasks that previously required dedicated headcount.

q5.question: What happens if an automation breaks?
q5.answer: All workflows include monitoring and error-handling. We provide 30-day post-launch support and can configure Slack/email alerts for any failure states.

sections.process_heading: How Does a Chatbot Get Deployed?

ecommerce.label: E-commerce
ecommerce.scenario: An AI-powered product advisor that helps customers find the right skincare products based on their skin type, concerns, and preferences.

leadgen.label: Lead Qualification
leadgen.scenario: A lead qualification bot that evaluates prospects, understands their needs, and routes qualified leads to your sales team.

support.label: Customer Support
support.scenario: An intelligent support agent that resolves common issues, creates tickets for complex problems, and escalates when needed.

q1.question: What makes an AI chatbot different from a rule-based chatbot?
q1.answer: AI chatbots use large language models to understand intent and generate contextual responses, while rule-based bots follow fixed decision trees. AI chatbots handle novel questions without pre-programmed paths.

q2.question: Can I try the chatbot before purchasing?
q2.answer: Yes — our Chatbots page features a live demo playground with 3 pre-configured personas: e-commerce, lead generation, and customer support.

q3.question: How do you configure the chatbot's persona?
q3.answer: Each chatbot receives a system prompt, tone guidelines, knowledge base documents, and example conversations. Configuration typically takes 3-5 business days for a production-ready persona.

q4.question: Does the chatbot integrate with my CRM?
q4.answer: Yes — chatbot-captured leads are routed directly to HubSpot, Salesforce, or your CRM via webhook. We configure the field mapping during onboarding.

q5.question: What languages does the chatbot support?
q5.answer: The underlying models support 50+ languages. We configure and test for your primary languages (EN/NL/ES as standard) during deployment.

q6.question: Is the chatbot GDPR compliant?
q6.answer: Yes — all conversation data is processed within EU data centers, chat history is not retained beyond the session by default, and we provide a DPA on request.

voice-agents.quick_answer: AI Voice Agents by Future Marketing AI handle inbound and outbound calls autonomously — qualifying prospects, scheduling appointments, and resolving support queries at scale.

sections.use_cases_heading: What Can AI Voice Agents Do?
sections.partnership_heading: How Do Voice Agents Integrate With Your Stack?

q1.question: What is an AI voice agent?
q1.answer: An AI voice agent is a conversational telephone bot that can handle inbound calls (qualifying prospects, answering FAQs) or make outbound calls (follow-ups, appointment reminders) using natural language.

q2.question: How human-like is the voice?
q2.answer: Modern text-to-speech models produce near-human speech with adjustable tone, pace, and accent. Most callers cannot distinguish the agent from a human in the first 30 seconds.

q3.question: What call scenarios can voice agents handle?
q3.answer: Lead qualification, appointment scheduling, inbound support routing, outbound reminders, NPS surveys, and post-purchase follow-up calls are the most common use cases.

q4.question: How do voice agents integrate with my phone system?
q4.answer: We use Twilio or Vonage as the telephony layer, which connects to most VoIP systems. SIP trunking or PSTN integration is included in all deployments.

q5.question: What is the average call deflection rate?
q5.answer: Clients typically see 40-70% deflection on repeat/FAQ inbound queries within the first 90 days, reducing live agent queue time significantly.

marketing-machine.quick_answer: The AI Marketing Machine by Future Marketing AI is an integrated system combining automations, chatbots, content production, and paid amplification into a single self-optimizing growth engine.

sections.features_heading: What Does the Marketing Machine Include?
sections.how_it_works_heading: How Does the Marketing Machine Get Built?

q1.question: What is the AI Marketing Machine?
q1.answer: The AI Marketing Machine is an integrated system combining workflow automations, conversational AI, content production, and paid amplification into a single self-optimizing growth engine managed for you.

q2.question: How is this different from buying individual tools?
q2.answer: Individual tools require manual orchestration. The Marketing Machine is a managed service where AI coordinates the tools, and we handle strategy, operations, and optimization.

q3.question: What does 'Marketing Machine' include?
q3.answer: A standard engagement includes: lead generation automations, a configured chatbot, content calendar and AI-assisted production, ad campaign management, and monthly optimization sprints.

q4.question: How long until I see results?
q4.answer: Infrastructure setup takes 3-4 weeks. Most clients see measurable pipeline impact (qualified leads, booked calls) within 60 days of launch.

q5.question: Is this suitable for B2C companies?
q5.answer: The Marketing Machine is optimized for B2B. B2C companies with high-ticket products (EUR 1.000+) can benefit, but the playbook is calibrated for longer sales cycles and account-based targeting.

q6.question: What does ongoing management involve?
q6.answer: Monthly: performance review, A/B test analysis, content refresh, ad budget reallocation, and chatbot knowledge base updates. Quarterly: strategy reassessment and roadmap update.

meta.title: About Future Marketing AI | AI Agency for Growth Teams
meta.description: Learn about Future Marketing AI, the autonomous marketing platform built by operators for ambitious businesses. Launching with 3 founding teams.

hero.title: About Future Marketing AI
hero.tagline: Building the autonomous marketing system of the future

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.text: To democratize enterprise-grade AI marketing automation for ambitious businesses. We believe every company should have access to the same intelligent marketing capabilities as Fortune 500 companies — without the Fortune 500 budget.
mission.why_text: We built this platform for ourselves first. As operators running our own marketing, we were frustrated by fragmented tools, manual workflows, and the inability to scale without hiring. So we built the system we wished existed.

assisted.title: AI-Assisted Marketing Era
assisted.description: ChatGPT and similar tools help marketers work faster, but still require significant manual oversight and coordination.

autonomous.title: Autonomous Marketing Era
autonomous.description: Complete AI systems that handle the entire workflow autonomously. This is where we are — and where early adopters gain a 3-5 year competitive advantage.

standard.title: Standard Practice
standard.description: Autonomous marketing becomes the norm. By then, early movers have built an insurmountable lead through compounding AI learning effects.

key_message.title: Early adopters gain a 3-5 year competitive advantage
key_message.description: Just like early Salesforce adopters in 2004 or early AI tool users in 2020 — being first compounds over time.

cta.title: Join the Founding Teams
cta.description: We are building this in partnership with 3 forward-thinking businesses. 7 founding slots remain.

hero.description: Managed AI services tailored to your business. Pick the services you need, scale when you are ready — no long-term contracts.

scale.name: Scale

cta.title: Ready to Put AI to Work?
cta.description: Book a free strategy call and we will map out exactly which services will drive the most impact for your business.

q1.question: Can I switch plans later?
q1.answer: Yes — you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle. No penalties, no lock-in.

q2.question: Is there a setup fee?
q2.answer: No. Setup, configuration, and onboarding are included in every plan. You pay only the monthly subscription fee — nothing extra to get started.

q3.question: What's included in each plan?
q3.answer: Every plan includes hosting, infrastructure, monthly maintenance, and support. Higher tiers add more AI services, analytics dashboards, priority support, and dedicated strategy calls.

q4.question: Do you offer custom enterprise pricing?
q4.answer: Yes — for organizations needing custom integrations, dedicated infrastructure, or SLA guarantees beyond our standard plans, we offer tailored enterprise agreements. Contact us to discuss your requirements.

meta.title: Legal | Future Marketing AI
meta.description: Legal information, terms of service, privacy policy, and cookie policy for Future Marketing AI.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content: By using our services, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Future Marketing AI provides AI-powered marketing automation services on a subscription basis. All subscriptions are month-to-month unless otherwise agreed upon. We reserve the right to modify these terms with 30 days notice. Services are provided as-is, and while we strive for maximum uptime, we do not guarantee uninterrupted availability.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: We collect personal data necessary to provide our services, including name, email, and company information submitted via our contact forms. Your data is processed in accordance with GDPR regulations. We do not sell your personal information to third parties. Data is stored securely within the EU and retained only for the duration of your business relationship with us. You have the right to access, rectify, or delete your personal data at any time.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.content: Our website uses essential cookies required for basic functionality and optional analytics cookies to improve our services. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are necessary for the website to function. Analytics cookies are only set with your explicit consent. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes only. While we strive to keep the information accurate and up-to-date, we make no representations or warranties of any kind about the completeness, accuracy, or reliability of the information. Any reliance you place on such information is strictly at your own risk.
